title: Hoffmannseggella ghillanyi

Hoffmannseggella ghillanyi is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants such as trees. This orchid species is often classified as a terrestrial orchid, but it also can be epiphytic in its growth habit. Hoffmannseggella ghillanyi is further categorized under the subtribe Paphiinae.
